name: Ghost Knight of Jackal
name_jp: ジャッカルの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target that destroyed monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon that target to your field in Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target that destroyed monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon that target to your field in Defense Position.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can target that destroyed monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon that target to your field in Defense Position.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
